title: Smoky Stew with Lettuce and Gem
description: A hearty stew made with smoky sausage, tender gem lettuce, and a hint of dutch spices. Serve with a side of crusty bread for a comforting meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the smoky sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Pour in the stew and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the chopped gem lettuce and cook until wilted.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
